message: bpf_perf_event_output reaches the helper with xdpdump_perf_map declared as a normal array, but the helper requires BPF_MAP_TYPE_PERF_EVENT_ARRAY
required_proof: the map passed as argument 2 to bpf_perf_event_output must be a perf event array while the packet metadata remains on the stack

related_spans.label: map declaration does not match the perf-output helper contract
xdpdump encodes captured packet length in the perf-output flags

evidence.detail: cannot pass map_type 2 into func bpf_perf_event_output#25

help: Keep the bpf_perf_event_output call and the metadata/cap_len flag calculation; returning XDP_PASS without emitting metadata is not an equivalent xdpdump repair.
